name: Inpress your cold kirlia
description:
Your kirlia has always been a expressionless lass ever since you save her from illegal butchery when she was a ralts. making you worried about her. and it doesn't help when you have a dirty thought when she has a killer body. she seems to noticed that, and decide to profit from it. could this be your chance to make your kuudere smile?

(art by SaltyXodium)
creator: terribilis
